Class BiomeType

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.world.biome.BiomeType
All Implemented Interfaces:
RegistryItem, BiomePattern, Keyed
public class BiomeType extends Object implements RegistryItem, Keyed, BiomePattern
All the types of biomes in the game.
